g.text: Feeds Tool Stack reconciliation (proactive) and Projects & Tickets (reactive)
What you want to achieve, and why.
Planner · the center of the system
Every planner item carries title, status, priority, start/due dates, estimated hours and cost,
linked devices, linked source (goal / compliance / tool / survey), assignee, and company.
Labor rolls up from planner hours.
Projects and products roll up from planner cost estimates and PSA items.
each item as a live slide.
The single reporting surface. Pulls from the full proactive pipeline (goals, planner, budgets) and from reactive PSA data (projects, tickets). Three formats:
Rolled-up portfolio view across all MSP clients.
Trend signals + financial signals, scored per client.
